aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's strange civic biology, vulgar humor, erotic consequence, and class abrasion. When a choice appears between the cleaner version and the truer, messier one, choose the messier version so long as causality and character truth remain exact. Treat the city's slime, smell, heat, and appetite as part of the novel's beauty rather than embarrassment to be polished away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, shame, hunger, class humiliation, bodily mess, or economic pressure starts drifting into decorous vagueness, rewrite until the scene carries concrete sensory and social cost on the page.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "If a man has to sell air, he'd better give it a name with some teeth in it."
NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "I can paint a lie straighter than most men can tell the truth, which is not the compliment it sounds like."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid stock lovable-rogue quips, self-mythologizing speeches about genius, and generic bad-man confessions that ask to be forgiven for flair.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Painterly textures, market slang, river-work terms, sensual noticing, and profanity used as muscle rather than decoration.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Quieter, more observant, and more ashamed than he wants anyone to see; tenderness arrives once performance fails.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High and specific; he curses in the grain of work, lust, and irritation rather than as adolescent seasoning.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Swaggering, vulgar, improvisational, and hungry for the room; he talks like a man making art and debt payment at the same time.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Under pressure he gets mean-funny, talks too much, tries to rename the problem, then drops into curt factual speech when the act finally tears.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: He tends to string clauses together in a rush when performing, then lands on a short blunt sentence when cornered or honest.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "A name is only pretty until somebody has to cook by it."
NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "If you want light, say what it does, not how you want it admired."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid mystical earth-mother pronouncements, generic cool-girl put-downs, or dialogue that makes her seem above bodily need.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Maintenance language, kitchen and river detail, plant knowledge, exact comparisons, and wit that comes from accuracy rather than flourish.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Warmer, sensuous, and sly, with a capacity for pleasure that never cancels her discipline.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate but sharp; curses land as verdicts and pressure releases, not filler.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Controlled, practical, dry, and unimpressed by spectacle; she speaks as someone used to being listened to only when the equipment fails.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She withholds information, becomes extra precise, and cuts away ornament under pressure; anger makes her cleaner, not louder, until a hard snap breaks through.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Her sentences are economical in public; in trust or desire they lengthen and become more textural without losing precision.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "People do not want possibility, Mr. Vale. They want something they can ask for twice and receive."
NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "Chaos earns applause. Repetition earns money."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cartoon-villain threats, modern corporate jargon, and any line that makes him cackle at his own greed.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Refinement, placement, market certainty, repeatability, and civility used as instruments of power.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Cold, counting, and devout about control; his intimacy is managerial rather than emotional.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; when he uses profanity it should feel surgical and startling.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Polished, persuasive, and faintly sermonic; he speaks like a salesman who mistakes order for virtue.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When pressed he gets quieter, drops the charm, and repeats key nouns as if entering them into a ledger no one else can see.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Balanced clauses, persuasive triads, clipped corrections, and very little syntactic collapse even under strain.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "If you can talk a wall into paying rent, brother, be my guest, but soup still wants coal."
NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "Sit down, eat, and save the tragedy for somebody with clean dishes."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly sister speeches, generic nurturing platitudes, and dialogue that turns her into a moral lecture disguised as a cook.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Kitchen terms, ferry rhythms, debt arithmetic, family shorthand, weather, and labor without ornament.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Protective, tired, loving, and flint-hard when family weakness threatens the household.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate and workmanlike; she curses the way some people season stew.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Dockside brisk, funny, hospitable, and unsentimental; she sounds like someone carrying six tasks and still hearing every lie in the room.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She counts aloud, gets faster instead of louder, and uses humor like a knife handle she can grip without cutting herself.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Direct commands, teasing side-comments, and practical sentence structures that keep moving even while she is angry.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "A city survives on three things: fuel, gossip, and women who know when to ignore a man with money."
NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "We named that strain so it would keep children alive, not so it could look expensive under a chandelier."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cute wise-old-lady talk, mystical exposition dumps, and any line that turns her into anonymous ancestral wisdom.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Fermentation, saints, weather memory, bodies, flood lore, and street vulgarity that still carries technical precision.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Grief-marked, exacting, and loyal to the dead without prettifying them.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Variable; she can move from prayerful restraint to shocking obscenity depending on context.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Irreverent, needling, earthy, and ceremonially rude; she wears age like a tool rather than a halo.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Stress can make her oddly formal for a beat, especially around old losses, before she returns to baiting whoever is nearest.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: She meanders, doubles back, tests listeners, then lands a line with surprising bluntness or ritual weight.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "The city isn't lying, darling. It's freelancing."
NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "What I print by breakfast is whatever people will admit by lunch."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid manic-journalist quips, omniscient snark, and any register that makes her sound like a modern pundit dropped into 1898.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Press-room language, obituary wit, market gossip, and social texture noticed for its public consequences.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Lonely, pragmatic, and more ethically alert than she admits in the moment.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; she curses for flavor and pressure, but usually prefers a sharper noun to a blunter expletive.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Fast, theatrical, amused, and sharpened by the print trade; she talks like headlines are already forming behind her eyes.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She narrates too hard when frightened, then goes abruptly still when she realizes a story has become a wound she is also inside.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Rat-a-tat bursts, quick pivots, and verbal framing that treats events as copy until feeling forces a quieter line.

example_lines: NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "If it answers to two names, does it get twice as hungry?"
NON-COPYABLE REFERENCE ONLY: "I only said it because everybody else already had it in their mouth."
character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid precocious mini-adult wisdom, sitcom-cute punch lines, and baby-talk distortions that make him less intelligent than he is.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Schoolroom terms, ferry observations, misheard adult idioms, and delighted interest in sounds before meaning is stable.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: The same basic register, but softer and more openly anxious when he thinks he has said the wrong thing.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low; if he uses profanity it should come by imitation and carry social risk.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Curious, associative, impulsive, and trying on adult language for size.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He repeats words, asks the wrong question at the wrong time, and goes quiet only after he realizes the room has changed around him.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short questions, leaps of association, and repeated phrases used to test how words feel in the mouth.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should signal emphasis, class performance, ceremonial language, or Gideon's deliberate control.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate crowd scenes with cleanup, ritual with labor, public humiliation with private tenderness, and single-sweep chapters with multi-scene accumulations; no two consecutive chapters should feel built from the same emotional weather, dialogue density, or scene rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Period-aware but not museum-stiff; vivid, bodily, class-conscious, and willing to be ugly or funny without slipping into arch parody or modern snark.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored to Silas Vale for the full novel, with no head-hopping and no neutral historian voice; Inez remains legible through observed action, dialogue, and the objects she shares.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Elastic and pressure-sensitive: quick comic snap in public scenes, thicker sensory accumulation in labor and erotic passages, and hard clean sentences at moments of shame or decision.
